file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    paths-ignore:
      - 'docs/**'
      - '**.md'
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - 'docs/**'
      - '**.md'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai

jobs:
  test-core3:
    timeout-minutes: 10
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      max-parallel: 6
      matrix:
        java: [ 21, 25 ]
        os: [ ubuntu-24.04, macos-latest ]
        exclude:
          - java: 25
            os: macos-latest
    name: Test core3 JDK ${{ matrix.java }} on ${{ matrix.os }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.java }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: zulu
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
          cache: maven

      - name: Build and test core3
        run: ./mvnw -V --no-transfer-progress -pl core3 -am clean package

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai"

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \

tool_use_result.originalFile:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai"

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \
    gnupg \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Add Azul Zulu repository
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv-keys 0xB1998361219BD9C9 || true
RUN echo "deb http://repos.azul.com/ubuntu stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/zulu.list

# Install Zulu JDK 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    zulu-21 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
